---
title: Fuel Prices in Auckland
subtitle: STATS 220 Semester One, 2026
output: html_fragment
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE)
```

```{css}

```

## What's going on with this data?

You need to change the contents of this Rmd! Replace the R code and markdown give below in this template document.

```{r}
library("tidyverse")

csv_file <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vTElqKsgASNluXUaano0vLYorvYaBtoDSF2gCqncpWcQAzg2BnE7kft1m-gm_eIMdFa0fGTrocxx_Ou/pub?output=csv"

logged_data <- read_csv(csv_file)

logged_data <- logged_data %>%
  rename(
    `Date` = `Enter the date`,
    `Time` = `Enter the time`,
    `Fuel Brand` = `Select the fuel station brand`,
    `Location` = `Where is the fuel station located? Only enter the suburb/town/district.`
  )

# Location and Time data

logged_data$`Location`

logged_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = `Location`)) +
  geom_bar() +
  theme_minimal()

# Unleaded 91 data

logged_data$`Unleaded 91`

unleaded_91 <- logged_data$`Unleaded 91`

average_91 <- sum(unleaded_91) / length(unleaded_91)

average_91 <- round(average_91, 2)

logged_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = `Unleaded 91`)) +
  geom_bar() +
  theme_minimal()

# Premium 95 data

logged_data$`Premium 95`

premium_95 <- logged_data$`Premium 95`

filtered_95 <- premium_95[!is.na(premium_95)]
filtered_95

average_95 <- sum(premium_95, na.rm = TRUE) / length(filtered_95)

average_95 <- round(average_95, 2)

logged_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = `Premium 95`)) +
  geom_bar() +
  theme_minimal()

# Premium 98 data

logged_data$`Premium 98`

premium_98 <- logged_data$`Premium 98`

filtered_98 <- premium_98[!is.na(premium_98)]
filtered_98

average_98 <- sum(premium_98, na.rm = TRUE) / length(filtered_98)

average_98 <- round(average_98, 2)

logged_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = `Premium 98`)) +
  geom_bar() +
  theme_minimal()

# Overall data

paste0("The average prices of fuel per litre is $", average_91, " for Unleaded 91, $",
      average_95, " for Premium 95, and $", average_98, " for Premium 98.")
```

![](https://c.tenor.com/-qBsG1HwR
